items.title: Brent crude slips as Qatar, Pakistan announce 60-day roadmap for U.S.-Iran deal
items.title_zh: Brent crude slips as Qatar, Pakistan announce 60-day roadmap for U.S.-Iran deal
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Brent oil futures turned negative on Monday after mediators Qatar and Pakistan said U.S.；and Iranian officials had agreed on a roadmap aimed at reaching a final deal within 60 days.；In a joint statement following talks at Switzerland's Bürgenstock resort, the mediators said the parties would continue technical negotiations throughout the week and establish a high-level committee to oversee the mediation process.
important_points: Brent oil futures turned negative on Monday after mediators Qatar and Pakistan said U.S.
and Iranian officials had agreed on a roadmap aimed at reaching a final deal within 60 days.

In a joint statement following talks at Switzerland's Bürgenstock resort, the mediators said the parties would continue technical negotiations throughout the week and establish a high-level committee to oversee the mediation process.

items.title: No one wants AI data centers on Earth. Do they make sense in space?
items.title_zh: No one wants AI data centers on Earth. Do they make sense in space?
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Following the astronomical success of the SpaceX IPO — raising $85.7 billion, valuing the newly public company in the trillions, and minting Elon Musk as the world's first trillionaire — what many skeptics still view as a pie-in-the-sky idea, building AI data centers in space, is coming into view.；There is good reason for the skepticism, but the concept has potentially moved onto at least a more plausible path as a result of the SpaceX windfall.；SpaceX has reliable, reusable Falcon rockets — and a more powerful one in the wings — while its xAI has an insatiable need for compute power and its space-based internet service, Starlink, has upgradeable satellites.
important_points: Following the astronomical success of the SpaceX IPO — raising $85.7 billion, valuing the newly public company in the trillions, and minting Elon Musk as the world's first trillionaire — what many skeptics still view as a pie-in-the-sky idea, building AI data centers in space, is coming into view.
There is good reason for the skepticism, but the concept has potentially moved onto at least a more plausible path as a result of the SpaceX windfall.

SpaceX has reliable, reusable Falcon rockets — and a more powerful one in the wings — while its xAI has an insatiable need for compute power and its space-based internet service, Starlink, has upgradeable satellites.

important_points: Club name FedEx will soon step into the earnings spotlight after a holiday-shortened week of trading brought good news on the Iran war and oil prices.

Also on our radar in the week ahead is May inflation data — though caveats are needed, as we'll explain later — and earnings from memory chipmaker Micron , one of the most consequential companies in the artificial intelligence trade.

items.title: 'Regime change but in a velvet glove': How Kevin Warsh has set out to remake the Fed
items.title_zh: 变动但温柔处理：凯文·沃斯如何重塑美联储
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh's first big announced changes point toward a quiet revolution, with task forces set up to rethink virtually everything done to set policy and the approach used to get there.；Following his first meeting at the helm Wednesday, Warsh outlined the plan — a sprawling, ambitious endeavor entailing five task forces that will utilize resources and experts within the Fed and from the outside.；The reviews amount to a comprehensive examination of all the areas that define modern monetary policy.
important_points: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh's first big announced changes point toward a quiet revolution, with task forces set up to rethink virtually everything done to set policy and the approach used to get there.

Following his first meeting at the helm Wednesday, Warsh outlined the plan — a sprawling, ambitious endeavor entailing five task forces that will utilize resources and experts within the Fed and from the outside.
The reviews amount to a comprehensive examination of all the areas that define modern monetary policy.

items.title: 白银不是黄金，双重定价逻辑拆解
items.title_zh: 白银不是黄金，双重定价逻辑解析
items.summary: 近期黄金与白银均上涨，但白银涨幅更大，市场预期不同。数据显示白银需求增长强劲，供给稳定，价格受通胀、避险情绪等多因素影响。投资者需关注行业需求变化。
important_points: 沪银涨幅大于黄金，但启动时间不同
白银ETP净投资显著增长
白银价格受供需与经济增长影响
白银与黄金价格逻辑不同

items.title: 浙南小城翻身战：从GDP“腰斩”到蓄力重返百强｜探新长三角
items.title_zh: 浙南小城翻身战：从GDP“腰斩”到蓄力重返百强
items.summary: 浙南小城经历了GDP的严重下滑，近年来通过产业转型和政策支持逐步回升，展现出蓬勃复苏的信号。数据显示，2025年经济增速回升，传统产业结构调整加速，未来发展规划明确。
important_points: 苍南在GDP下滑后迅速恢复，成为重点县之一
五年内经济增速目标明确，推动产业升级
新能源项目投入大幅提升，2025年产值显著增长

items.title: 一揽子金融改革重磅出台，美伊签署谅解备忘录丨一周热点回顾
items.title_zh: 金融改革举措出台，市场关注焦点突出
items.summary: 近期发布的金融改革政策对市场产生了重要影响。央行和美联储调整利率、创设回购工具，推动资本市场开放。同时，上海离岸金融体系规划升级，资本市场改革加速。行业数据显示消费增速放缓，但新技术推动制造业发展。各部门发布行动方案，促进平台经济协同发展。
important_points: 央行优化短端利率调控，增强货币政策传导效率
上海离岸金融体系规划升级，提升国际化水平
资本市场改革加快，支持企业并购与再融资
平台经济协同发展行动方案发布，推动创新

items.title: 芯片股狂欢周！美股基金流入创新高，日经7万点，韩股一年涨两倍
items.title_zh: 芯片股市热潮：美股基金大规模进军
items.summary: 近期芯片股表现强劲，美股基金净流入创新高，数据显示市场对AI和半导体的关注持续上升。机构投资者普遍做多，科技板块资金流入热潮，行业增长预期持续提升。
important_points: 美股基金净流入创新高，达1192亿美元
科技板块单周净流入达192亿美元
AI投资持续超预期，推动科技股涨幅

items.title: 港股券商股午后持续拉升
items.title_zh: 港股券商股价持续上涨
items.summary: 市场整体上涨，多家金融机构表现强劲。中信证券和广发证券等公司上涨超过9%，显示投资者信心增强。数据显示行业整体趋势正向，投资热情持续高涨。
important_points: 港股整体上升幅度明显
中信证券和广发证券表现强劲
多家机构上涨超过6%
投资者信心增强
